summaryForNext: Backend: openspec, driven by /kbd-apply (one task/turn). 4 changes dispatched in dependency order; first pending: add-oauth-endpoint-hardening. Per-change QA: artifact-refiner + security-review (all 4 harden an auth/secret path; audit every authorize entry point) + fail-closed degrades_to_deny test; archive via --skip-specs. One new crate (bcrypt@0.19) in change 2. Guardrail: RFC-mandated auth is a MUST (G1 introspection per RFC 7662); federate any JWKS IdM, never an IdP.
